test.note: Exit code 1 due to missing DATABASE_URL and INBOUND_API_KEY env vars (no DB/services in this env). Unit tests that don't require external services pass (inbound-dedupe: 4/4, rate-tracker: 3/3). Pre-existing, not introduced by misc-1.

typecheck.note: Exit code 1 from 3 test files importing 'bun:test' which tsc cannot resolve. Pre-existing issue unrelated to misc-1 changes. All production code typechecks cleanly.

lint.note: 316 errors and 963 warnings across 654 files — all pre-existing. Files changed in misc-cleanup-1 were checked individually: the only new file (lib/webhooks/cron-auth.ts) has zero lint issues. All errors in modified files (onboarding/page.tsx, daily-usage/route.ts, etc.) are pre-existing.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refactor-worker skill step 1 could be more explicit about verifying that extracted utilities carry their own imports, so consumer files can drop now-unused imports after extraction.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: In misc-cleanup-1, the worker correctly removed NextResponse import from daily-usage/route.ts after extracting assertCronAuthorized to lib/webhooks/cron-auth.ts (which imports NextResponse itself). The skill says 'grep the codebase to find ALL instances' but doesn't specifically mention import cleanup in consumer files after extraction.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refactor-worker skill could mention checking for callers/consumers when modifying API schemas — removing a field from a request body schema requires updating all call sites.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Removing apiKey from SendDemoEmailBody schema in demo.ts required updating 2 separate page files (onboarding/page.tsx and onboarding-demo/page.tsx). Worker handled it correctly but noted the skill could be more explicit.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: In the 'Central URL Config' section, note that SUPPORT_EMAIL defaults to support@${NOTIFICATION_DOMAIN} (not empty string), so self-hosters get a reasonable default even without setting the env var explicitly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: lib/config/app-url.ts was updated in misc-cleanup-1 to change SUPPORT_EMAIL default from '' to `support@${NOTIFICATION_DOMAIN}`. Current AGENTS.md lists SUPPORT_EMAIL as an export but doesn't mention its default value.
